Demo Article

Body text that is sufficiently long to make readability happy and produce a real article extraction with multiple sentences. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

A second paragraph with additional content so the readability scorer treats this as a substantive article rather than a thin page. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur.
